questions.question: What famous landmark or landmark scene is shown in this image?
questions.rgb_answer: The image shows the Taj Mahal, which is a renowned mausoleum located in Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is an ivory-white marble structure that was commissioned in 1632 by the fifth Mughal emperor, Shah Jahan, to house the tomb of his beloved wife, Mumtaz Mahal. The Taj Mahal is widely recognized as one of the most beautiful examples of Mughal architecture and is a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
